chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1613 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi. 3. For hearing of MA 13843/16 24.10.2016. Mr. Pir Bux Bhurgri, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, A.A.G alongwith SIP Muhammad Rahim SHO P.S Satellite Town Mirpurkhas, and ASI Shafiq Abro P.S Pabban. -.-.-. Today, learned A.A.G has filed statement on behalf of police officials/respondents No.2 to 5, wherein, inter alia it has been stated that neither they are providing any shelter to private respondents nor causing harassment to the petitioner. However, learned A.A.G states that whenever petitioner will approach the concerned SHO, he will provide the requisite protection to her. Consequently, instant petition is disposed of with the directions to the official respondents/police officials to provide requisite protection to the petitioner strictly in accordance with law against the private respondents and ensure that no harm is caused to her, as she belongs to minority community. JUDGE Ali Haider
